courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Rule Translation Game
genericDescription: Translate rules from another domain into play; preserve conceptual integrity; identify what changes during translation.
specificDescription: Adapt a scholarly method, artistic constraint, or AI process into a playable rule set. Include a short "translation key" showing how original terms map to mechanics.
gradingRubric: 30 pts quality of rule translation; 20 pts playable depth; 20 pts track relevance; 15 pts translation key; 15 pts reflection.
